message:
licensing: adopt MIT + OpenAI/Anthropic rider across workspace metadata

Summary:

- Replaces top-level LICENSE text with MIT License (with OpenAI/Anthropic Rider), including the additional restriction clauses exactly as requested.

- Updates README badge and License section to reference MIT+Rider instead of plain MIT.

- Replaces per-crate `license = "MIT"` declarations with `license-file = "../../LICENSE"` across the workspace crates so published metadata aligns with the rider text.

Verification:

- Re-scanned LICENSE/README/Cargo.toml files for plain-MIT markers and removed all plain-MIT license declarations.

- Ran `cargo metadata --no-deps` to confirm manifest parsing remains valid.

@@ -17,7 +17,7 @@ Minimal, high‑performance terminal UI kernel focused on correctness, determini

 ![rust](https://img.shields.io/badge/rust-nightly-blue)
-![license](https://img.shields.io/badge/license-MIT-green)
+![license](https://img.shields.io/badge/license-MIT%2BOpenAI%2FAnthropic%20Rider-green)
 
 ## Quick Run (from source)
 
@@ -1704,4 +1704,4 @@ let historical_frame = recorder.current();
 
 ## License
 
-MIT © 2026 Jeffrey Emanuel. See `LICENSE`.
+MIT License (with OpenAI/Anthropic Rider) © 2026 Jeffrey Emanuel. See `LICENSE`.
